text: The Reasons Why I Believe A Buy Rating Is Not Justified For Clorox (Rating Upgrade). Clorox managed to keep its sales flat YoY and improve its EPS slightly, despite contracting gross margins, due to elevated energy prices. Based on a dividend discount model, assuming 2% growth in perpetuity and a 7.7% required rate of return, the upside from the current price levels seems to be limited. For these reasons, I upgrade CLX to hold.
